About ASTRA — Vision & Mission
SAUDI ARABIA'S FIRST FULLY AI-MANAGED STERILIZATION PACKAGING MANUFACTURER
▲ ASTRA Medical Packaging — ISO Class 7 Cleanroom Manufacturing Facility, Jeddah Industrial City
Our Vision

To be the leading manufacturer of sterile barrier systems in the Arabian Peninsula, protecting patient safety through precision manufacturing, AI-driven quality assurance, and sustainable supply chain practices aligned with Saudi Vision 2030.

Our Mission

ASTRA manufactures ISO 11607-compliant sterilization pouches, rolls, and wraps that safeguard the sterility of medical instruments from the production line to the point of care. We serve Saudi Arabia's 500+ hospitals, 2,000+ clinics, and the broader GCC healthcare network through the NUPCO national procurement framework.

Strategic Positioning: ASTRA is the only domestic manufacturer of the full sterilization packaging product range in Saudi Arabia, replacing 100% imported supply with locally manufactured, SFDA-certified, NUPCO-listed products.

🏥 NUPCO Network — 500+ Saudi Public Hospitals
Market Analysis

Saudi Arabia imports 100% of its sterilization packaging requirements, creating a direct import-substitution opportunity for ASTRA. The NUPCO national procurement framework (Tender NPT0007-24) provides a guaranteed, structured demand channel covering all 500+ public hospitals.

Manufacturing Cost Formula
Material Cost = Width(m) × Length(m) × GSM × Waste Factor ÷ 1000 × Price(SAR/kg)
Ops Overhead = Material Cost × 15%
Total Mfg Cost = Material Cost + Operations Overhead
Gross Margin = (NUPCO Price − Mfg Cost) ÷ NUPCO Price × 100%

Why Partner with ASTRA
FIRST-MOVER ADVANTAGE · GUARANTEED DEMAND · AI EXCELLENCE · VISION 2030
🇸🇦
First-Mover Advantage
ASTRA is the only domestic manufacturer of the complete sterilization packaging range in Saudi Arabia. 100% of current supply is imported — ASTRA captures this entire market with local production, SFDA certification, and NUPCO listing.
📋
Guaranteed Demand Channel
NUPCO Tender NPT0007-24 provides a structured, guaranteed procurement channel covering 500+ public hospitals. The national procurement framework eliminates market development risk and ensures predictable revenue from Day 1.
🤖
AI-Powered Operations
The NEO AI Core platform with 13 intelligence modules delivers industry-leading operational efficiency: 99.97% QC accuracy, 85% OEE, -23% waste, -18% procurement cost, and -40% maintenance cost versus industry benchmarks.
💰
Exceptional Financial Returns
SAR 28.75M investment generates SAR 18.4M net income in Year 1 (64% ROI), with 5-year cumulative cash flow of SAR 178.9M (622% ROI). Year 1 break-even with 66% EBITDA margin by Year 5.
🌿
Vision 2030 Alignment
Directly supports Saudi Vision 2030 healthcare localization targets: import substitution, local content development, manufacturing sector growth, and healthcare system strengthening. Eligible for SIDF financing and industrial incentives.
🏆
Premium Quality Assurance
ISO 13485 QMS, ISO 11607 sterile barrier compliance, SFDA registration, and 100% AI vision inspection ensure zero-defect patient safety outcomes. Internationally recognized certifications open GCC and global export markets.
